description: Monitor shut off during patient transport. Replaced with fully charged battery from supply. Device back online.
E-02 error. The lid wouldn't close. Found a piece of tape on the latch. Removed it, device working normally.
The biological indicator test strip failed after the morning cycle. The instruments are not sterile.
Monitor shut off again during transport, battery died even though dock showed solid green. Replaced battery again.
E-04 Imbalance error mid-cycle. The rotor was perfectly balanced though. The motor made a loud grinding noise and spun down.
Screen showing 'Low Pressure' during the heat-seal cycle. The door seal looks brittle and cracked.
Third time this week: Monitor shut off midway down the hall. We've swapped the battery three times now and the dock is fine.
Blood sample tube broke inside during the run. Blood has spilled into the enclosed motor housing. We powered it off.
Blood pressure cuff won't inflate. Hose is not kinked.
Timer knob fell off. Stuck it back on, seems okay.
